category_sources: Official SourceForge project page says GPT fdisk modifies GUID Partition Table disks and includes FixParts for MBR problems.
source_facts.description says GPT fdisk provides text-mode partitioning tools.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge project page use GPT fdisk.
docs_sources: Official RodsBooks GPT fdisk site provides project documentation and obtaining/building instructions.
repo_sources: Official RodsBooks download page says SourceForge is the official home of the project; official SourceForge Code page exposes the GPT fdisk source tree.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project page lists Storage, Systems Administration, Partition Managers and GPT/MBR repair features.
source_facts.executables lists cgdisk, fixparts, gdisk, and sgdisk.
